open_plans.title: Vision Workmarket Dashboard Boundary Finalization Plan
open_plans.goal: Remove the remaining `workmarket -> vision` dashboard prompt and voice compile-time dependency while preserving the existing `/dashboard/me/vision/*` and `/dashboard/me/voice/*` behavior.

next_action: Use `make implementation-batch topic=<topic>` for a deterministic broad-work pass, or `make codex-context topic=<topic> intent='<intent>'` when you only need topic-specific context once this control snapshot is fresh.
